stories.title: Everything that will decide Knicks-Spurs
stories.summary: The red-hot Knicks face the rising young Spurs. Our experts examine everything to know ahead of Wednesday's Game 1 (8:30 ET, ABC)

stories.title: SGA calls MVP year a 'failure' after OKC falls sho...
stories.summary: Despite claiming his second straight MVP, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander called his season a failure after the Thunder were eliminated before getting a chance to defend their title in the NBA Finals.

stories.title: Harper on labor talks: 'Can't lose that momentum'
stories.summary: Phillies star Bryce Harper expressed concern over what could happen to the sport if the 2027 season is compromised because of a lockout.

stories.title: Yanks overwhelm A's with historic 13-run inning
stories.summary: The Yankees scored 13 runs in an inning for the first time in nearly 21 years Sunday as their first 12 batters in the third reached safely against an overwhelmed pitching staff for the Athletics.

stories.title: Pulisic breaks drought, hopes people stop 'talking...
stories.summary: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino was "happy" with the contribution of attacker Christian Pulisic, who broke his five-month scoring drought with a goal and an assist in a 3-2 friendly win over Senegal.
